text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Community Meals * At Risk Youth 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter At Risk Youth Homeless Men Homeless Youth Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF JOE'S PLACE MINISTRIES CAVE JUNCTION YOUTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place to connect with others through social activities that include games, events, and outings. Also provides meals, clothing, and personal care products. 126 S Redwood Highway Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Ages 11-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 3:30pm-6:30pm Email (541) 476-4563 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOE'S PLACE MINISTRIES GRANTS PASS YOUTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place to connect with others through social activities that include games, events, and outings. Also provides meals, clothing, and personal care products. 1205 Rouge River Highway Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Ages 11-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 3pm-6pm Email (541) 476-4563 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION HOME YOUTH SERVICES HOME YOUTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day shelter with drop-in services and an overnight emergency shelter. Supports youth with meals, laundry, showers, personal items, and community connection. Accepts school supply donations. Programs include: Runaway and Homeless Youth Program (RHY): Connects youth and their families to resources that meet their immediate needs. Also provides mediation and counseling resources for family reunification. The goal is safe exits from the streets, achieved through relationships with local law enforcement, street outreach, and working closely with the school district and other community partners. Youth Empowerment Program (YEP): Offered in 4 elements including internships and jobs, financial literacy, workshops and field trips, and extended support. Youth cohorts go through the program in 3-month cycles and can earn high school credit for their work and experiences during the program. Taylor's House is a 10 bed emergency shelter thay offers services for study support, social activities, job training. Onsite treatment and counseling services, as well as meeting rooms for appointments, visits and recreation. 625 Union Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 11-17, 18 if still in school or working towards a GED Hours: The Drop In: Noon-7pm / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm Email (971) 273-7300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOE'S PLACE MINISTRIES CAVE JUNCTION YOUTH CENTER JOE'S PLACE MINISTRIES GRANTS PASS YOUTH CENTER MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HOME YOUTH SERVICES
